task: Parse an AWS S3 bucket name from an S3 URI (e.g., 's3://my-bucket/path/to/file.txt') and extract just the bucket name
Create a JSON CloudFormation template for an IAM role that trusts the EC2 service
Write a Python function that takes an AWS region code and returns the corresponding region name (e.g., 'us-east-1' returns 'N. Virginia')
